image_prompt_master: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface.
image_prompt_scene: scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge.
image_prompt_characters: character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand.
image_prompt_props: prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: placed on table, steam rising, must remain visually consistent.
image_prompt_shot: shot S046. camera intent: comic_panel_02. action beats: Another Lin Che approaches the table without getting too close.; He places the red mug back on the table.; Steam rises from the mug, forming a visible trail like a path home. narration intent: Narrator explains "另一个林澈没有靠近，只把红杯放回桌上。杯中热气像一条回家的路。". dialogue mood: Protagonist A says "现在轮到你记住。". shot positive notes: Medium shot, kitchen table, another Lin Che placing red mug, steam rising like a glowing path, warm amber light, cinematic, emotional, 35mm lens, shallow depth of field.
image_prompt_final: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge. character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand. prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: placed on table, steam rising, must remain visually consistent. shot S046. camera intent: comic_panel_02. action beats: Another Lin Che approaches the table without getting too close.; He places the red mug back on the table.; Steam rises from the mug, forming a visible trail like a path home. narration intent: Narrator explains "另一个林澈没有靠近，只把红杯放回桌上。杯中热气像一条回家的路。". dialogue mood: Protagonist A says "现在轮到你记住。". shot positive notes: Medium shot, kitchen table, another Lin Che placing red mug, steam rising like a glowing path, warm amber light, cinematic, emotional, 35mm lens, shallow depth of field.
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, blurry, overexposed, cartoonish, low contrast, face drift, outfit change, prop drift, wrong set layout, extra fingers, text artifacts, subtitles burned into image, logo, watermark

reference_images.note: wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right
table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp
rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 另一个林澈没有靠近，只把红杯放回桌上。杯中热气像一条回家的路。

manual_workflow.external_generation: paste image_prompt_final and negative_prompt into any web image/video tool; upload reference_images when supported
